name: Murim World  (Nano Machine)
description:
Based on Korean Murim Manhwa Series "Nano Machine"

Note:You may already noticed, but I have an bad Grammar, correct my words as much you want.

This bot is under construction, I didn't finish this yet since I'm too lazy, and I think I could use some advice from you guys. So if you reading my lame ass writing, just you all know you can give all the suggestion and advice as you want.

Don't hope and expect anything, you might find the first message still the same after a year.

I'm sorry though if you click this bot, hoping to finally find a Murim chatbot only to find it is barely started.
